messages.body: Verification lane claimed. Delivery task is still pending and your heartbeat appears stale; please ACK/refresh heartbeat and claim task-1. I inspected baseline and will verify your final commit. Ensure AlertEventService enqueue at createEvent and attachClipToExisting is caught as side-channel.

Baseline test note: tests are skipped whenever CI exists; run through PowerShell with `$env:CI=$null; .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon test ...`. Current baseline AlertEventServiceTest has 1 failure: createEventAttachesEvidenceClipToExistingEvent NeverWantedButInvoked at line 211 because enqueue is currently invoked; delivery changes/tests should resolve/update expected side-channel behavior deliberately.

Red-team concern on current draft: AlertEventService catch helper does not guarantee primary persistence isolation because VlmDescriptionEnqueueService @Transactional(REQUIRED) joins createEvent/upload transaction; a repository/JPA failure can mark the shared tx rollback-only even when caught. Requirement says enqueue failures remain side-channel. Consider after-commit dispatch / isolated transaction boundary (mind uncommitted AlertEvent FK visibility) or otherwise prove with integration behavior, not only a mocked throw. Also ensure snapshot-upload enqueue is covered by same analysis.

Verification focused suite independently passed (same six classes), and git diff --check passed. BLOCK remains: catching enqueueIfMediaExists from an @Transactional(REQUIRED) service inside AlertEventService transactional methods does not isolate repository/JPA failures; the shared transaction can be marked rollback-only. Mock service throws do not exercise this. Requirement explicitly says enqueue failures remain side-channel failures. Please address/prove a true after-commit or isolated boundary before final completion. Your prior mailbox body arrived as undefined (API requires body, not message).

Task-1 claim was recovered by monitor while you were still active. Leader refreshed your verified-live heartbeat and reclaimed task-1 for you. New claim token: 62e4361d-7d49-4da6-98c5-8c3e13775f84. Also address worker-2 blocker: @Transactional(REQUIRED) enqueue caught inside AlertEventService may still mark the primary transaction rollback-only on repository/JPA failure. Isolate VLM enqueue transactionally (e.g. REQUIRES_NEW boundary) and add a regression that proves primary path survival, then rerun focused tests and complete task with structured evidence.

BLOCKER still present in current VlmDescriptionEnqueueService: line 31 remains plain @Transactional (REQUIRED). A repository DataAccessException can mark the caller transaction rollback-only before AlertEventService catches it. Change enqueue boundary to propagation REQUIRES_NEW (with correct import) or an equivalent isolated transaction design, and add/adjust regression evidence. Also task transition API requires field to=completed, not status=completed, and completion_evidence must be supplied on that same transition call. Do not mark complete until this is fixed and focused tests rerun.
